creator: zooko@zooko.com
text:
I'm the maintainer of a secure storage service (sort of like Amazon S3 but secure, or sort of like Tarsnap but open source and decentralized), named Tahoe-LAFS. Tahoe-LAFS is incompatible with PyCrypto 2.2 due to bugs in PyCrypto 2.2:

http://tahoe-lafs.org/trac/tahoe-lafs/browser/trunk/src/allmydata/_auto_deps.py?rev=4749

The current release of PyCrypto is 2.3 which merely fixes a couple of bugs from PyCrypto 2.2:

http://gitweb.pycrypto.org/?p=crypto/pycrypto-2.x.git;a=blob;f=ChangeLog;h=8075b68031e025d741e2b07be119b2fc5becaec6;hb=9e9641d0a9b88f09683b5f26d3b99c4a2e148da5

Please upgrade the port of security/python-pycrypto from 2.2 to 2.3. Thank you!

Regards,

Zooko O'Whielacronx
